title: Just A Lot Of Sodas (JALOS)
description: This mod adds Coca-Cola, Sprite, Pepsi, Dr Pepper, Cream Soda, Gatorade, their flat versions, and much, much more sodas!
body:
This mod adds Coca-Cola, Sprite, Fanta, Dr Pepper, Pepsi, Cream Soda, Sparkling Water, 7up, Gatorade, Root Beer, Mountain Dew, and Red Bull!

You need a can to get the sodas.

Craft a can with 6 iron nuggets in a door shape.

To carbonate your soda, craft a carbonator with 7 iron ingots in a cauldron shape and an iron nugget on the top middle.

Put your flat soda in the first slot of the carbonator, press the button, and your soda is carbonated!

Drinking carbonated soda will give you the "Hyper" effect, which means speed 2 and jump boost.

*All the crafts are shapeless except the can and the carbonator.

The crafts are revamped in 1.4.0. Scroll down to see them, or go down to to the bottom to see all the crafts in 1.9.0 together.

Craft Coca-Cola with 1 can, 1 water bottle, and 2 sugar.

For Sprite you need flavoring.

Craft 2 flavoring bottles with 1 apple, 1 sugar, and 2 empty bottles.

Craft Sprite with 1 can, 1 water bottle, 1 flavoring bottle, and 1 sugar.

**1.1.0:**

Craft Fanta with 1 flavoring, 1 can, 2 sugar, and 1 water bottle.

There is a problem with Fanta in this version, an it's fixed in 1.2.0.

**1.2.0:**

This version fixes the bug where if you drink Fanta, you won't get the can back.

This version also adds Dr Pepper and Pepsi.

Craft Dr Pepper with 1 can, 1 water bottle, 2 sugar, and 2 flavoring, and craft Pepsi with 1 can, 1 water bottle, and 3 sugar.

**1.3.0:**

This version adds cream soda. Craft it with 1 can, 1 water bottle, 3 sugar, and 1 flavoring bottle.

**1.4.0 Recipes + Items:**

**Recipes:**

- Coca-Cola: 2 sugar, 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Sprite:	1 sugar, 1 flavor bottle, 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Fanta: 1 fruity flavoring (new item) 2 sugar, 1 can, 1 water bottle.	
- Dr Pepper: 1 flavoring, 1 sugar, 1 sugary flavoring (new item), 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Pepsi: 1 flavoring, 2 sugar, 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Cream Soda:	2 sugar, 1 sugary flavoring (new item), 1 can, 1 water bottle.

**New Items:**

Sugary Flavoring Bottle (crafted with 2 bottles and 2 sugar)

Fruity Flavoring Bottle (crafted with 2 bottles and 2 apples)

**1.5.0:**

This adds flavored water and sparkling flavored water, and a few other things.

**The main sodas (flavored water and sparkling flavored water):**

Craft flavored water with 1 sugar, 1 water bottle, and 1 fruity flavoring. Carbonate it to get sparkling flavored water. This will not make you hyper when you drink it.

**The other things:**

Now when you drink a soda, it will give you the hyper effect for a certain amount of time, depending what it is. Here's a list of all the hyper times for the sodas:

- Coca-Cola and Pepsi: 1 min.
- Sprite: 30 sec.
- Fanta: 50 sec. *There is a bug with this, I fixed it in 1.5.1.
- Dr Pepper: 1 min 20 sec.
- Cream Soda: 1 min 10 sec. *There is also a bug with this one. I fixed it also in 1.5.1.

**1.5.1:**

This fixes the bugs with Fanta and Cream Soda where you don't get the hyper effect when you drink them.

**1.6.0:**

This adds a bunch of new sodas and 1 change.

**Change:**

When you drink carbonated Sprite (and 7up) now you'll get 40 seconds of hyper instead of 30.

**New sodas/energy drinks:**

- This adds 7up (crafted from Sprite and you can craft it back to Sprite) which is basically the same thing as Sprite but with a different texture.
- This adds food coloring (red, yellow, and blue). Craft it with 1 of its color dye and 1 sugar.
- This adds red, yellow, and blue Gatorade. Craft it with a water bottle, the color food coloring, and 2 sugar. It will not give you any effect when you drink it.

**1.7.0:**

This adds root beer and individual leaves.
To get root beer, you need leaves. Craft any kind of leaf into 9 leaves, and put them in the furnace to dry them. Craft root beer with 1 can, 1 water bottle, 2 sugar, and 1 dried leaf.
It will make you hyper for 50 seconds, just like Fanta.

**1.8.0:** 

This adds Mountain Dew, which is crafted with 1 can, 1 water bottle, 1 sugar, 1 fruity flavoring, and 1 yellow food coloring. It will make you hyper for 1 minute 10 seconds, just like cream soda.

**1.8.1:**

This fixes the bug where if you drink a sparkling flavored water, you don't get the bottle back.

**1.9.0:**
This adds Red Bull, which is crafted with 1 can, 1 water bottle, 1 sugar, 1 flavoring bottle, and 1 yellow food coloring. It gives you the hyper effect for 50 seconds, just like Fanta.

**Here are all the crafts:**
- Can: 6 iron nuggets in a door shape.
- Carbonator: 7 iron ingots in a cauldron shape with an iron nugget in the top middle.
- 2 flavoring bottles: 1 apple, 1 sugar, 2 empty bottles.
- 2 fruity flavoring: 2 apple, 2 empty bottles.
- 2 sugary flavoring: 2 sugar, 2 bottles.
- Coca-Cola: 2 sugar, 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Sprite: 1 sugar, 1 flavor bottle, 1 can, 1 water bottle or 1 7up.
- Fanta: 1 fruity flavoring (new item) 2 sugar, 1 can, 1 water bottle.	
- Dr Pepper: 1 flavoring, 1 sugar, 1 sugary flavoring (new item), 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Pepsi: 1 flavoring, 2 sugar, 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Cream Soda: 2 sugar, 1 sugary flavoring (new item), 1 can, 1 water bottle.
- Flavored water: 1 sugar, 1 water bottle, 1 fruity flavoring.
- 7up: 1 sprite.
- Food coloring: 1 dye (red, yellow, or blue), 1 sugar.
- Gatorade: 1 water bottle, 1 food coloring (red, yellow, or blue), 2 sugar.
- 9 individual leaves: 1 leaves (oak, birch, spruce, etc.)
- Dried leaf: Smelt a leaf.
- Root beer: 1 can, 1 water bottle, 2 sugar, 1 dried leaf.
- Mountain Dew: 1 can, 1 water bottle, 1 sugar, 1 fruity flavoring, 1 yellow food coloring.
- Red Bull: 1 can, 1 water bottle, 1 sugar, 1 flavoring bottle, 1 yellow food coloring.
